turns.user: bạn có thể cho tôi biết hôm nay có gì hot trên github không?
turns.assistant_text:
Hiện tại, tôi không thể truy cập thông tin hot trên GitHub. Tuy nhiên, bạn có thể kiểm tra trực tiếp trên trang GitHub Trending để xem các dự án và repo đang được quan tâm nhất. 

Nếu bạn cần thông tin cụ thể hơn, hãy cho tôi biết!

turns.user: hôm nay có tin gì hot không?
turns.assistant_text:
Dưới đây là một số tin tức hot hôm nay:

1. **[Tin re-balances but investors are still betting on scarcity](https://www.mining.com/web/column-tin-re-balances-but-investors-are-still-betting-on-scarcity/)** - Mining.com
   - Giá thiếc đang tăng cao, với giá giao dịch gần mức cao nhất mọi thời đại. Sản xuất thiếc toàn cầu dự kiến sẽ tăng trưởng 8.7% trong năm nay.

2. **[Lead-Free Perovskites Push Solar Cells Toward Safer High-Efficiency Designs](https://www.azom.com/news.aspx?newsID=65493)** - AZoM
   - Nghiên cứu đang hướng tới việc thay thế chì độc hại trong pin mặt trời bằng các vật liệu an toàn hơn như thiếc và bismuth, nhằm cải thiện hiệu suất và an toàn môi trường.

3. **[Temperatures rise ahead of hot, dry spell](https://www.ynetnews.com/environment/article/sydbx0sxze)** - Ynetnews
   - Dự báo thời tiết cho thấy nhiệt độ sẽ tăng cao và khô hạn trong những ngày tới, đặc biệt là ở các khu vực miền núi và nội địa.

4. **[Florida man sues Carnival for $5M after suffering 2nd-degree burns on cruise’s hot pool deck](https://www.aol.com/articles/florida-man-sues-carnival-5m-222330000.html)** - AOL.com
   - Một người đàn ông ở Florida đã kiện Carnival vì bị bỏng độ 2 khi đi trên sàn hồ bơi nóng chảy của tàu du lịch.

Nếu bạn cần thêm thông tin chi tiết về bất kỳ tin tức nào, hãy cho tôi biết!

items.title: Column: Tin re-balances but investors are still betting on scarcity - Mining.com
items.summary: Silver Futures $ 75.495 / ozt  7.47%. Micro Gold Futures $ 4713.1 / ozt  3.80%. Micro Silver Futures $ 75.48 / ozt  7.54%. Gold Futures $ 4713.3 / ozt  3.84%. LME three-month tin is trading at $55,225 per metric ton, close to the all-time high of $59,040 reached during the frenzied cross-metals rally in January. The London tin price is up by 36% since the start of the year. The next best performer is aluminum, which has risen by 23% and is experiencing an unprecedented supply shock after the loss of Gulf production due to the Iran war. Tin supply has no direct exposure to the war in the Gulf, unlike aluminum, nickel and copper. Global mine production is on course to grow by a healthy 8.7% this year, according to the International Tin Association (ITA). Production at the Bisie mine in the Democratic Republic of Congo is stable after last year’s brief closure due to encroaching M23 insurgents.

items.title: Lead-Free Perovskites Push Solar Cells Toward Safer High-Efficiency Designs - AZoM
items.summary: **By replacing toxic lead with safer alternatives such as tin, bismuth, antimony, and double perovskites, researchers are charting a path toward next-generation solar cells that could combine high performance with improved environmental safety.**. Image 4: Figure oulined the schematic representation of lead-free perovskite structure (A site represents monovalent cation, X represents a halide anion with bi/trivalent cation from each type of perovskite family) and the year-wise progression of the most efficient PSCs from each lead-free perovskite family from 2016 to 2025. _Figure oulined the schematic representation of lead-free perovskite structure (A site represents monovalent cation, X represents a halide anion with bi/trivalent cation from each type of perovskite family) and the year-wise progression of the most efficient PSCs from each lead-free perovskite family from 2016 to 2025._. The review highlighted key design approaches that have helped raise tin-based lead-free device power conversion efficiencies from below 1% to 17.13%, thereby providing a research roadmap for developing more scalable, high-performance, and environmentally sustainable solar technologies.

items.title: Temperatures rise ahead of hot, dry spell - Ynetnews
items.summary: # Temperatures rise ahead of hot, dry spell. ## Seasonal weather expected Tuesday before further warming, with conditions turning hotter than usual by Thursday, especially in the mountains and inland areas. Temperatures will rise slightly Tuesday and remain seasonal in most parts of Israel. Further slight increases are expected Wednesday and Thursday. By Thursday, conditions will become warmer than usual to hot and dry, especially in the mountains and inland areas. Friday is also expected to remain warmer than usual to hot and dry. items.title: Florida man sues Carnival for $5M after suffering 2nd-degree burns on cruise’s hot pool deck - AOL.com
items.summary: # Florida man sues Carnival for $5M after suffering 2nd-degree burns on cruise’s hot pool deck. A Florida traveler burned his bare feet on a scorching pool deck on a Carnival Cruise ship, according to his $5 million lawsuit that claims two others have had to have their lower extremities amputated because of similar injuries. Jorge Luis Alverio Nunez suffered the horrific burns on a quick, 20-step jaunt from the pool to his shoes on Carnival Magic’s Lido Deck, according to his Florida federal complaint. The surface was so “dangerously hot” that “within a matter of seconds,” he’d suffered second-degree burns on the soles of his feet during the May 21, 2025, incident, claims the suit filed earlier this month. Carnival failed to put up warning signs about the scorching hot temps of the floor despite the fact that 25 other people have been burned in the past six years on the decks of various Carnival ships — all made from API Syntheteak, a material prone to sear under the sun’s rays, the filing alleges.
